changes.value: The nice column drop-zone overlay only shows in non-source windows. It should also show in the source window during cross-window drags, since dropping back in the source window is a valid same-board move. The overlay effect looks nice and should be visible everywhere.
Show drag target overlay in source window too (same-board drag)

 title: Show drag target overlay in source window too (same-board drag)
 ---
 The nice column drop-zone overlay only shows in non-source windows. It should also show in the source window during cross-window drags, since dropping back in the source window is a valid same-board move. The overlay effect looks nice and should be visible everywhere.
